# seerr_requests (Data Source)

Get information about all existing Seerr requests.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_requests" "all" {}

output "total_requests" {
  value = length(data.seerr_requests.all.requests)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder ID for the data source.
- `requests` (Attributes List) List of requests. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--requests))

<a id="nestedatt--requests"></a>
### Nested Schema for `requests`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The ID of the request.
- `media_id` (Number) The ID of the media associated with the request.
- `requested_by_id` (Number) The ID of the user who made the request.
- `status` (Number) The status of the request (1: Pending, 2: Approved, 3: Declined).
